creator: wefa@callcenter.systemhaus.net
text:
There are no kde 1.1 sources on the distribution 
media, although there are both ports and packages.

This is (among others) relevant because the kde11 
package has a bug in kdm which can be cured by 
recompiling the port (don't ask me why).

Fix: 

If this is supposed to be this way, someone should put 
an appropriate 'restricted' clause in the makefile. 

Else, put the sources onto the cds.
